pages.text: Runes are passive ability amplifiers. There are three types: blue, red, and green. A player can activate only one rune per type. Runes can be obtained from cursed vault as an empty rune.$(br)$(br)Green runes drop with a 15% chance (3% each).$(br)Blue runes drop with a 45% chance.$(br)Red runes drop with a 40% chance (20% each).

pages.title: Empty Rune
pages.text: Activated with right-click mouse button to obtain a random rune.$(br)Source: cursed vault.

pages.title: Star Points Ampl. Rune
pages.text: Amplifies star points:$(br)- I: +10$(br)- II: +15$(br)- III: +20$(br)Type: Blue$(br)Upgradable via runelogist.

pages.title: Master Ef. Dur. Rune
pages.text: Extends master effect duration:$(br)- I: +2 min 30 sec$(br)- II: +5 min$(br)- III: +10 min$(br)Type: Red$(br)Upgradable via runelogist.

pages.title: Stone Rech. Red. Rune
pages.text: Reduces stone recharge time:$(br)- I: -30 sec$(br)- II: -1 min$(br)- III: -2 min 30 sec$(br)Type: Red$(br)Upgradable via runelogist.

pages.title: Protection Rune
pages.text: Creates a spherical shield.$(br)Type: Green$(br)No levels.

pages.title: Spin Rune
pages.text: Generates a tornado around the player that deals damage.$(br)Type: Green$(br)No levels.

pages.title: Invisibility Rune
pages.text: Makes the player fully invisible.$(br)Type: Green$(br)No levels.

pages.title: Healing Rune
pages.text: Triggers a regeneration effect.$(br)Type: Green$(br)No levels.

Rune Upgrades$(br)$(br)Upgrade blue and red runes via a new villager profession: runelogist. To do this:$(br)- Collect runes from cursed vault.$(br)- Trade them with the runelogist to reach maximum level.
